characters.physical_details: Tall, lean, unruly dark hair, mismatched eyes, blue suit, stubble.
characters.occupation_status: Bounty hunter; former Red Dragon logistics operative.
characters.literacy_languages: Literate in common and old syndicate route codes.

state_transitions.change: Recognizes the mysterious ship's ping as the old Lin Shao-Feng logistics handshake.
Finds the annotated manifest and a live node response showing Lin Shao-Feng listeners still watch the old corridor.
Learns from Hector that Ayane Kozuki was a courier with a child after her husband's death.
His alias and withheld information are exposed during the crew argument.
Learns Ren placed the manifest and that Ayane depended on corridors he helped standardize.

characters.physical_details: Large, bald, bearded, scarred, with a black prosthetic left arm.

key_relationships.ren_kozuki: Forces him to face his precinct's role.

characters.occupation_status: Owner-pilot of the Bebop; former ISSP detective; bounty hunter.
characters.literacy_languages: Reads precinct files, manifests, and repair manuals.

state_transitions.change: Sees the dormant Hosuke Takara bounty tied to his sealed vetting file.
Learns the Takara file was reactivated through dead informant Daichi Kozuki's code path.
Admits he sat on the Daichi lead and helped maintain the crew's pact of not-knowing.
Learns his former partner sold out Daichi and reads proof at Dry Well.
Writes 'Jet Black' on Mama Yun's tab instead of hiding behind ship or initials.

characters.physical_details: Physically mid-twenties; dark hair, green eyes; no scar on her left shoulder blade.

key_relationships.ren_kozuki: Daughter of the woman who used Faye's identity.
key_relationships.ayane_kozuki: Dead woman who survived under Faye's name.

characters.occupation_status: Bounty hunter; cryogenic-revival debtor; amnesiac about most pre-freeze life.
characters.literacy_languages: Reads common, records, gambling slips, and debt paperwork.

state_transitions.change: Miriam says she remembers 'Faye' at the Golden Ox and identifies the collarbone gesture.
Confirms at the records office that her identity packet was sold through employee misconduct/data resale three years after freezing and used for 11 years 17 days.
Meets Ren face to face and receives the data chip.
Learns Ayane used her identity to access treatment and that the collarbone gesture's original owner cannot be proved cleanly.
Learns Ayane felt guilty about the theft and that the left-shoulder scar was a welding burn from age sixteen.

characters.physical_details: Wiry, androgynous, red-orange hair, dark skin, goggles, usually barefoot.

key_relationships.ren_kozuki: Fellow researcher; later sends her a cleaned packet.

aliases: Edward Wong Hau Pepelu Tivrusky IV
characters.literacy_languages: Hyper-literate in code and networks; functional conventional literacy.

state_transitions.change: Finds that the pilot pulled Ed's orphanage file six months earlier.
Identifies Ren Kozuki, her work-history trail, and Dry Well.
Sends Ren a cleaned, indexed anonymous data packet and gets delivery confirmation.

characters.physical_details: Enhanced Welsh corgi; reddish-brown and white.
characters.literacy_languages: Understands far more human speech than the crew credits; communicates by barks and directed attention.

characters.physical_details: Lean, dark-haired mechanic with callused hands, a split thumbnail, and coveralls.

key_relationships.ayane_kozuki: Mother; courier, transplant patient, and later user of the Faye Valentine identity packet.
key_relationships.daichi_kozuki: Father; ISSP informant killed after a leak inside Mars precinct channels.
key_relationships.jet_black: Forced witness to Daichi's case and precinct failure.
key_relationships.faye_valentine: Owner of the stolen identity packet Ayane used.

characters.occupation_status: Licensed mechanic and smallcraft pilot; works paid Mars jobs under her real name; three docking permits are lapsed and one public-lane engine-swap fine is on record.
characters.literacy_languages: Reads schematics, route manifests, clinic files, and precinct paperwork.

state_transitions.change: Names herself to Faye and hands over the first data chip.
Is identified to the crew as Daichi and Ayane's daughter.
Brings the crew to Dry Well, reveals the Kozuki archive, and gives them working-copy sets.
Leaves Dry Well in her ship and silently accepts Ed's cleaned packet.

characters.availability: Unseen pilot through chapter 9 except glimpses; face-to-face in chapter 10; present in chapters 16-18.

characters.physical_details: Older noodle-shop owner with low reading glasses, soy-stained nails, and drying orange peel.

key_relationships.jet_black: Food, tabs, and berth in exchange for repairs.

characters.occupation_status: Owner of Mama Yun's Noodle House; runs tabs and trades berth access for repairs.
characters.literacy_languages: Functionally literate; keeps tab books and shop notes.

state_transitions.change: Tells the crew the masked pilot prepaid six months for the rear berth in clean cash and asked after refrigeration.
Takes Jet's real-name tab without comment after the Bebop returns to the berth.

characters.availability: Appears in chapters 1 and 18; referenced elsewhere.

characters.physical_details: Mid-fifties, tired eyes, Ganymede accent, patched cardigan, bad right knee.

key_relationships.faye_valentine: Recognizes the stolen identity at the Golden Ox.
key_relationships.ayane_kozuki: Remembered her as 'Faye Valentine' at the Golden Ox.

characters.occupation_status: Service worker rotating through Mama Yun's and a breakfast diner.

state_transitions.change: Recognizes 'Faye' from the Golden Ox and names the collarbone gesture.
Adds the blue dress, the left-shoulder-blade scar, and the detail that Ayane tipped.

characters.physical_details: Gray, narrow-shouldered ex-logistics man with a green plastic ring.

key_relationships.ayane_kozuki: Remembered her as a quiet courier asking patient questions.

characters.occupation_status: Owner of The Radiant; former syndicate logistics worker.

characters.physical_details: Broad ISSP desk sergeant with glasses.

key_relationships.jet_black: Former colleague who still grants him limited file access.

characters.literacy_languages: Fully literate in ISSP administrative systems.

state_transitions.change: Shows Jet the Daichi Kozuki code path on the Hosuke Takara file.

characters.physical_details: Loud old Mars associate with deep laugh lines and fresh dentist misery.

key_relationships.jet_black: Old criminal-world acquaintance who still knows him as Hosuke.

characters.occupation_status: Mars underworld hanger-on; exact work unspecified.

timeline.story_start: Late autumn 2071, Tharsis, Mars: the Bebop returns from Deimos and finds its berth occupied.
timeline.estimated_span: Roughly ten on-page days after twenty-three months of Ren's off-page research.

seasonal_track.season: Late autumn on Mars edging toward winter: cold nights, thin light, dust, and worsening southern-basin chill.

key_events.event: The Bebop finds its berth occupied and pays for the paid lot.
Hosuke Takara, Lin Shao-Feng, and the Golden Ox memory surface.
Jet learns the Takara file was touched through Daichi Kozuki's code path.
Spike finds the annotated manifest and the Bebop heads south toward Hellas.
Ren's ship runs the crew through Hellas and leaves an 8,000-woolong traffic summons.
Faye confirms the identity theft while Spike learns Ayane's anti-rejection medicine moved on his old corridors.
Ed maps nearly twenty-three months of breadcrumbs, including an orphanage pull six months earlier.
Ren meets Faye in the market and hands over the data chip.
The chip reveals one family linking the crew's histories and the Bebop's worst argument follows.
The crew takes Sal Peretti for 15,800 woolongs and clears the 8,000-woolong fine.
Ed identifies Ren, Dry Well, and the Kozuki web; the crew chooses to go south.
At Dry Well, Ren reveals Daichi's betrayal, Ayane's stolen identity, and Spike's route link.
The crew reads the archive overnight and eats Ren's breakfast.
Ren departs; Ed sends a cleaned packet; the Bebop returns and Jet signs 'Jet Black.'

geography.primary_setting: Mars, mainly Tharsis and the southern Hellas basin, with backstory links to Ganymede, Earth, Europa, and Callisto.

key_locations.name: Mama Yun's Noodle House and rear berth
key_locations.details: Back-street Tharsis noodle shop. Jet's berth exists by barter and refrigerator repairs. Ayane once slept behind the same wall, hearing the refrigerator cycle.

key_locations.name: Tharsis paid docking lot
key_locations.details: Two blocks east of Mama Yun's. Cash-only kiosk used whenever the rear berth is unavailable.

key_locations.name: The Bebop
key_locations.details: Jet's aging trawler-home with galley, common room, observation deck, hangar, and chronic repair needs.

key_locations.name: Tharsis bazaar and settlement market
key_locations.details: Dense market maze used for the Peretti hunt and Ren's direct contact with Faye.

key_locations.name: Mars Civil Identity Records Office
key_locations.details: Low public office where Faye confirms the identity-packet theft, a data-resale finding, and an 11-year-17-day use window.

key_locations.name: Kessler Freight Annex / Spike's storage locker
key_locations.details: Old freight lockup holding Spike's dead logistics materials and the annotated manifest Ren planted.

key_locations.name: The Radiant
key_locations.details: Hector Moro's back-alley bar in Tharsis; source of Ayane and route-history details.

key_locations.name: Earth orphanage and cryogenic facility side systems
key_locations.details: Ren pulled Ed's intake file from the orphanage six months before the story; Faye's identity packet was copied from cryogenic records three years after suspension.

key_locations.name: Hellas basin
key_locations.details: Remote southern Mars terrain of canyons, dead infrastructure, clinic roads, and former syndicate freight routes.

key_locations.name: Dry Well
key_locations.details: Half-dead old syndicate waystation in southern Hellas. Rent is work. Ren has made it livable.

key_locations.name: The Golden Ox
key_locations.details: Ganymede gambling room where Miriam saw Ayane playing as Faye Valentine.

distances: Mama Yun's rear berth to the paid lot: two blocks east on foot.
Tharsis to Dry Well: several hours south by Bebop, across the basin lip and old freight country.
Dry Well sits deeper and colder in Hellas than the Tharsis settlements and clinic belts.
Mars to Ganymede and Mars to Earth are gate-travel backstory distances, not on-page trips.

world_rules: The story takes place in 2071 after humanity spread across the solar system through hyperspace gates.
Mars surface travel still depends on ships, fuel, weather, and terrain; Hellas favors smaller hand-flown craft.
Bounty hunters are semi-legal freelancers tolerated by ISSP and kept poor by unreliable payouts.
ISSP is bureaucratic and corrupt enough to lose, delay, or weaponize human lives through paperwork.
Red Dragon infrastructure survives in fragments: old route codes, relays, lockers, and corridor habits still matter.
Cryogenic suspension exists, and frozen patients' identity packets can be sold or abused by corrupt staff.
A clean identity changes access: clinics, landlords, and employers treat an expensive-looking name differently from a flagged poor or courier one.
Mars remains thin-aired, cold, dusty, partially terraformed, and full of failed infrastructure.

power_structure.mechanism: bureaucratic access, precinct routing, and selective enforcement

power_structure.holder: Red Dragon remnants and route middlemen
power_structure.over: freight corridors and old Mars waystations
power_structure.mechanism: violence, corridor control, and inherited logistics infrastructure

power_structure.over: patients with unstable identity or poor status
power_structure.mechanism: paper access, credential checks, and whether a name gets 'seen'
posted rewards, reduced payouts, fines, and chronic precarity
ship ownership, piloting, cooking, repairs, and the tab at Mama Yun's

objects.name: Ren's ship
objects.origin: Small custom craft with a freight-cold retrofit, a patched starboard fin, and hand-maintained systems.
objects.status: Occupies Mama Yun's berth at the opening, operates out of Dry Well by chapter 16, and departs chapter 18.

objects.name: Hosuke Takara bounty shell
objects.origin: Dormant file tied to Jet's sealed vetting history, surfaced through Daichi Kozuki's old code path as part of Ren's bait.
objects.status: Discovered by Ed in chapter 2; explained more fully by chapters 3, 9, and 14.

objects.name: Annotated cargo manifest
objects.owner: Originally Spike's old logistics archive; note added by Ren
objects.origin: Weapons-route manifest with medical rider for anti-rejection drugs and Ren's handwritten note.
objects.status: Found in Spike's locker, then carried to Dry Well as evidence.

objects.name: Data chip
objects.origin: Compiled family archive tying Ayane, Daichi, Faye's identity packet, and Jet's precinct to one household.
objects.status: Handed to Faye in chapter 10 and opened on the Bebop in chapter 11.

objects.name: Traffic summons
objects.origin: Issued after the Hellas chase for reckless flying in settlement airspace.

objects.name: Swordfish II
objects.origin: Spike's mono-racer kept in the Bebop hangar.

objects.name: Redtail
objects.origin: Faye's smallcraft kept in the Bebop hangar.
objects.status: Operational throughout; used for Faye's solo Mars run in chapter 7.

objects.name: Ren's document wall
objects.origin: Years of route maps, clinic copies, precinct forms, photos, and notes layered into a working archive at Dry Well.
objects.status: Read in place by the crew in chapters 16-17; working copies handed over at Dry Well.

debts.deadline: Whenever Mama Yun's rear berth is unavailable
debts.status: Ongoing leak on the Bebop budget

income_sources.amount: Variable; Sal Peretti posted at 30,000 woolongs but paid out 15,800 after review

income_sources.source: Jet's barter repairs for Mama Yun
income_sources.amount: Food, tab room, and berth access instead of cash
income_sources.reliability: Useful but contingent on the berth being free

knowledge_state.knows: The mysterious ship is using the old Lin Shao-Feng logistics handshake.
Hosuke Takara is his own buried alias and the sealed vetting file has been touched.
Daichi Kozuki's dead code path was used on the Takara file.
Her identity packet was copied through employee misconduct/data resale three years after freezing and stayed active for 11 years 17 days across clinic, travel, gaming, and debt systems.
Ren pulled Ed's orphanage intake file six months before the story.
The full Kozuki-Bebop web, including Jet's precinct link, Spike's route link, Faye's stolen identity, and Ed's later addition to the ship.
Ayane used the Faye Valentine identity because that name got care and paperwork Ayane Kozuki could not reliably get.

environmental_constants: Mars air is thin, cold, and dry; heat feels temporary.
Red dust gets into cuffs, seams, food, paper, and engine work.
The Mars sky reads as rust, bruise, brass, and wrong light, not Earth blue.
The Bebop smells of grease, dog, stale air, and Jet's cooking.
Mama Yun's place is broth steam, fluorescent buzz, cheap bowls, and a needy refrigerator.
Dry Well is wind on sheet metal, charger hum, hot dust, and machinery kept alive by labor.
Tharsis markets are crowded, noisy, spice-heavy, with repair smells.
